name: petstormcp-cliente
long_description:
Petstore - OpenAPI 3.1: This is a sample Pet Store Server based on the OpenAPI 3.1 specification.

Some useful links:
- [OpenAPI Reference](https://www.speakeasy.com/openapi)
- [The Pet Store repository](https://github.com/swagger-api/swagger-petstore)
- [The source API definition for the Pet Store](https://github.com/swagger-api/swagger-petstore/blob/master/src/main/resources/openapi.yaml)

environment.title: environment
environment.description: The environment name. Defaults to the production environment.  Options: [prod, staging, dev].

api_key.title: api_key
api_key.description: The api_key to use for the request

tools.name: pets-update
tools.description:
Update an existing pet

Update an existing pet by Id

tools.name: pets-add
tools.description:
Add a new pet to the store

Add a new pet to the store

tools.name: pets-find-by-status
tools.description:
Finds Pets by status

Multiple status values can be provided with comma separated strings

tools.name: pets-find-by-tags
tools.description:
Finds Pets by tags

Multiple tags can be provided with comma separated strings. Use tag1, tag2, tag3 for testing.

tools.name: pets-get-by-id
tools.description:
Find pet by ID

Returns a single pet

tools.name: stores-get-inventory
tools.description:
Returns pet inventories by status

Returns a map of status codes to quantities

tools.name: stores-orders-place
tools.description:
Place an order for a pet

Place a new order in the store

tools.name: stores-orders-get-by-id
tools.description:
Find purchase order by ID

For valid response try integer IDs with value <= 5 or > 10. Other values will generate exceptions.

tools.name: store-orders-delete
tools.description:
Delete purchase order by ID

For valid response try integer IDs with value < 1000. Anything above 1000 or nonintegers will generate API errors

tools.name: users-create
tools.description:
Create user

This can only be done by the logged in user.

tools.name: users-create-with-list
tools.description:
Creates list of users with given input array

Creates list of users with given input array

tools.name: users-logout
tools.description: Logs out current logged in user session

tools.name: users-update
tools.description:
Update user

This can only be done by the logged in user.

tools.name: users-delete
tools.description:
Delete user

This can only be done by the logged in user.
